query:
SELECT 
  created_at,
  status,
  file_size_kb
FROM backup_logs 
WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 0 DAY) - INTERVAL 8 HOUR + INTERVAL 1 MINUTE
ORDER BY created_at ASC;
